spec_match.rationale: Demo invokes the relevant API surface (Extended lifetime shared workers) and surfaces the result in the page, demonstrating the spec behaviour the feature ships.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive controls drive the page (3 buttons, 0 inputs, 0 selects, 0 ranges, 7 listeners) — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: Page surfaces multiple failure / unsupported / edge-case branches in the UI, not just the happy path.

references.rationale: The page now cites the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/5138641357373440 link in its see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, and button overrides keep background + color paired (CLAUDE.md rules 5 and 6).

summary: The missing ChromeStatus self-heal link is fixed, and the executable script arrows were corrected while preserving the escaped display snippet.
